acceptance_criteria.description: When offline, group pages show offline banner
acceptance_criteria.notes: OfflineBanner uses useOnlineStatus hook, shows on groups page when !isOnline
Quiz, notes, study plan are localStorage-only — no network dependencies. publishScoreUpdate is fire-and-forget + queued on failure

acceptance_criteria.description: Score sync failures queued in localStorage and retried on reconnect
acceptance_criteria.notes: syncQueue.ts enqueue/dequeueAll. MarmotContext drains queue on window 'online' event
Was already implemented in Story 02 — storage.ts resetAllData calls clearAllGroupData

acceptance_criteria.description: Group cards show member count badge
acceptance_criteria.notes: Was already implemented in Story 03 — GroupCard has memberCount badge
OfflineBanner tracks navigator.onLine via event listeners, auto-redisplays on reconnect→disconnect
